videos.title: Why "find your purpose" is the wrong advice | Corliss Rassyle | TEDxSugar Creek Women
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description:
What if the reason you haven’t found your purpose is because you’ve been looking for it in the wrong place?

For decades, we’ve been told to find our purpose as if it’s hidden somewhere outside ourselves, waiting to be discovered. But what if purpose isn’t something you find at all?
